steps.title: Spot the emotional context
steps.content: The motorman is frustrated and chafing in his box. When the text says “He registered discontent,” he's doing something with that emotion, and the context suggests the word conveys how his frustration becomes evident or noticeable.

steps.title: Match the word choice
steps.content: ”Displayed” (choice D) means to show or reveal something, which fits the context perfectly. The other choices don't fit: “enrolled” means to join, “valued” means to appreciate, and “disregarded” means to ignore. This matches choice D — D is correct.
